description_long: This is a modern, upholstered chaise with a light beige fabric covering its frame and seat. The backrest features deep button tufting, adding a touch of classic elegance, while the armrests are rolled and padded for comfort. Four decorative throw pillows, three square and one round, in dark blue and patterned fabrics, are arranged along the backrest. The chaise stands on four slender, metallic legs with a polished finish, giving it a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The overall silhouette is rectangular with rounded armrests and a low, continuous backrest. The upholstery appears soft and plush, inviting relaxation and comfort.
description: A modern beige upholstered chaise with tufted backrest, rolled armrests, and metallic legs, adorned with four decorative blue pillows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tufted backrest, rolled armrests, and all four decorative pillows prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the rolled armrest, and the profile of the pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back panel and the tops of the pillows peeking over the backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the armrest, the side profile of the seat, and the arrangement of the pillows.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is low and continuous, featuring deep button tufting for a classic, textured look. It is slightly curved and padded, providing both comfort and visual interest.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, rolled and padded, extending horizontally from the backrest to the front edge.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slender, straight, and metallic with a polished silver finish, giving the chaise a modern and elevated appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is primarily solid beige fabric with a tufted pattern on the backrest, while the pillows feature a mix of solid and patterned blue fabrics.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are four loose cushions: three large square pillows and one smaller round pillow, all arranged along the backrest for decorative and functional support.
